title: trisetum pumilum
intro: Trisetum pumilum, also known as the little wheat grass or dwarf false brome, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Trisetum pumilum is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and it is also used in some folk remedies for its purported health benefits.
